title: filipendula auriculata
intro: Filipendula auriculata, also known as golden dropwort, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, ulcers, and skin conditions. Filipendula auriculata is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving menstrual cramps, and soothing digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
